env.name: POLAR_ACCESS_TOKEN
env.note: Organization access token from your Polar (sandbox) dashboard

env.name: POLAR_WEBHOOK_SECRET
env.note: Optional locally — reconcile-on-return covers a missed webhook

env.name: POLAR_PRO_PRODUCT_ID
env.note: Polar product id mapped to the 'pro' plan

env.name: POLAR_BIZ_PRODUCT_ID
env.note: Polar product id mapped to the 'business' plan

notes: Add the five POLAR_* keys above to workers/env.d.ts so typecheck passes.
Adds four columns to the organizations table — apply the additive migration (references/organizations-schema-patch.md).
The Polar webhook receiver is the single writer of the org's billing columns.
